主...
items.summary:
先說結論:
別玩，如果真要玩，別花半毛錢。

前期劇情氛圍以及打牌戰鬥的體驗不錯，但也就前期了。
主線7章起敵人數值跟能力可以說嚴重膨脹，關卡造物加成卻沒辦法彌補數值之間的逆天差距，甚至可以說因為Roguelike機制導致道中關卡就要被菁英怪痛扁要坐牢重刷造物，但是這還僅僅是1.0忘卻篇沒有費用鑰令限制，等後面2.0星塵篇開始會有更逆天的限制費用出牌的機制 (你好好個打牌遊戲限制玩家打牌是要做什麼)。

變相逼迫玩家不斷課金買追強勢角色，更別說花完錢後就從機制上削弱。

items.title:
[正面] This game was exactly what I was looking for.
A t...
items.summary:
This game was exactly what I was looking for.
A turned based gacha that respects player time, and is more than generous on giving out currency.
Loving the combat gameplay as a roguelike enjoy, and I love the lovecratian theme and art style of the game.
For the first time i'm actually paying attention to a gacha's story, even if it's a bit hampered by the chatgpt translation. On this I have however been informed that they're working on english localisation, so that's likely not gonna be a problem anymore in the future.
Give it a try y'all, great stuff!

items.title: [负面] Started great, was my favorite game for a while, e...
items.summary:
Started great, was my favorite game for a while, especially gacha game, but recent changes shows worrying trend.

- Plans to add bonus to +12 (16 copies of a character)
- Adding time limited-wishes
- Removing auto from some of the content
- Pure greed.

items.title:
[正面] Redoing review with a lot more experience:
- Is a ...
items.summary:
Redoing review with a lot more experience:
- Is a gacha where dupes are important but you get a lot of rolls and get a free dupe for both character and wheel in shop each month (including limited as long as you have base). 30 rolls for pity, 90 for spark.
- No tutorial or guide on mechanics "learn quickly or die".
- Starts off much easier than Slay the Spire but the difficulty ceiling is much higher.
- (Almost all MTL translations have been fixed with human ones, devs very nice and interacting with volunteers)
- Story is sooo good, as are the character designs. Good amount of diversity with injury and illness as well.
- Devs have put so much love into its source media, community and other peoples projects along the way. And have promised to make an offline version if/when it will EoS

items.title: [正面] One of the best, underrated gachas.
items.summary: One of the best, underrated gachas.
